generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingControlSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuators modeled within BIM for lighting systems (e.g., TwinLight project) enabling bidirectional control signals between DT and physical building systems (e.g., adjusting lighting/HVAC based on DT-generated commands)"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC control actuators with explicit definitions by Building Control Engineers for real-time bidirectional communication with the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting control actuators modeled in BIM environment for TwinLight project, enabling dynamic adjustment based on occupancy and DT-generated commands"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor networks embedded in the physical building (BOREALIS project) feeding real-time energy consumption data into the DT via middleware"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance VisualComfortSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensors measuring visual comfort metrics (e.g., glare levels, brightness) in the building DT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VisualComfortDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy detection sensors providing real-time occupancy data for building management systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance MotionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motion detection sensors for occupancy tracking and automated lighting/HVAC control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature measurement sensors embedded in the building infrastructure for real-time monitoring of thermal conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Indoor air quality sensors measuring CO₂ levels to optimize ventilation and indoor air quality"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance BIMMetadataExtractor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Component extracting enriched BIM model metadata (tenant IDs, endpoint addresses) for DT integration"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BIMMetadataDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance VisualComfortDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VisualComfortSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor, MotionSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

instance BIMMetadataDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BIMMetadataExtractor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Core BIM model enriched with Building Control System runtime semantics (sensor configurations, control logic) extracted via model-driven transformations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTool
]

instance RuntimeInterfaceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Automatically generated runtime interfaces from BIM models using MDE tools for bidirectional data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D Unreal Engine 5 model representing the physical building for immersive visualization and interaction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance EnergyPerformanceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption data supplemented with post-occupancy analytics from BOREALIS reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveOptimizationService
]

instance ComfortMetricsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual comfort metrics including glare levels and brightness measurements from post-occupancy sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VisualComfortDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data including motion detection and tenant-specific tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CustomServiceIntegrationService
]

instance ThermalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements with runtime semantics from embedded sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance AirQualityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Indoor air quality data including CO₂ levels for ventilation optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CustomServiceIntegrationService
]

instance BIMMetadataData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Extracted BIM metadata including tenant IDs and endpoint addresses for DT integration"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMMetadataDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CustomServiceIntegrationService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework enabling automated transformations from BIM to runtime artifacts (model-to-model/model-to-text mappings) to reduce manual effort"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RuntimeInterfaceModel
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware platform facilitating real-time bidirectional data exchange between physical sensors and DT via runtime interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyDataTransmitted, VisualComfortDataTransmitted,
                   OccupancyDataTransmitted, TemperatureDataTransmitted,
                   CO2DataTransmitted, BIMMetadataDataTransmitted
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware platform for real-time data synchronization with extracted runtime semantics from enriched BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyDataTransmitted, VisualComfortDataTransmitted,
                   OccupancyDataTransmitted, TemperatureDataTransmitted,
                   CO2DataTransmitted, BIMMetadataDataTransmitted
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization platform enabling interactive building monitoring and decision-making via Unreal Engine 5 models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualizationModel
]

instance StandardizedExtensionPoints : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture framework enabling service integration and scalability through standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomServiceIntegrationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service providing live building performance data visualization via Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service offering energy efficiency optimization (e.g., BOREALIS project) and performance monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficiencyInsight
]

instance CustomServiceIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service framework enabling domain-specific plugins (e.g., IoT analytics, AI-driven control policies) via standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomPluginService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation capability for performance analysis during design and operation phases"
    DTDFVocab:provides DesignSimulationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization results enabling Facility Managers to adjust HVAC/lighting based on occupancy data in Unreal Engine 5"
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive optimization results showing energy efficiency balancing recommendations for BOREALIS project"
]

instance CustomPluginService : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated deployment of custom DT plugins (e.g., IoT analytics, AI-driven control policies) via standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DesignSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance analysis results from simulation models during building design and operation phases"
]

instance ReinforcementLearningPolicy : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Parameter updates via reinforcement learning policies (e.g., BOREALIS feedback loop) for adaptive building control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceSchedulingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Task planning for maintenance scheduling based on predictive analytics and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PerformanceReport : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of performance reports (e.g., ODTE metric validation) for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C17: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains EnergyConsumptionSensor, VisualComfortSensor, OccupancySensor,
                 TemperatureSensor, CO2Sensor, MotionSensor,
                 BuildingControlSystemActuator, HVACActuator, LightingActuator,
                 EnrichedBIMModel, RuntimeInterfaceModel, UnrealEngineVisualizationModel
]

instance LEEDPlatinumBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "LEED Platinum academic building infrastructure serving as the Living Lab case study"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals and commands generated by the DT are transmitted back to physical building systems via the same middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) and BIM-based control configurations (e.g., TwinLight’s BIM-centric control framework). This enables automated adjustments to lighting, HVAC, or other BCS components based on DT-driven optimization algorithms (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The framework supports **real-time synchronization** (sub-second latency) for critical operational data (e.g., sensor readings, control commands) and **batch processing** for non-critical updates (e.g., periodic BIM model refreshes). The time-scale is optimized for **live operational monitoring** (e.g., BOREALIS’ reinforcement learning updates) and **post-occupancy data-driven adjustments** (e.g., adaptive lighting control)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is structured as a **centralized hub** with:
   - A **core DT** integrating BIM, sensor data, and control logic via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto).
   - **Decentralized services** (e.g., lighting, HVAC, analytics) deployed via standardized extension points, allowing for horizontal integration of domain-specific plugins (e.g., IoT analytics, AI-driven optimization).
   - **Orchestration**: Unified control via BIM-based BCS configurations (e.g., TwinLight’s layered architecture) ensuring interoperability across physical and virtual assets."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the entire building life cycle, covering:
   1. **Design Phase**: Enriched BIM models with device configurations (e.g., TwinLight’s BIM-centric control logic).
   2. **Construction Phase**: Automated extraction of physical asset metadata from BIM for DT deployment.
   3. **Operation Phase**: Real-time synchronization with physical assets via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto), enabling adaptive control (e.g., BOREALIS’ reinforcement learning).
   4. **Refurbishment Phase**: Modular updates via DT services (e.g., custom plugins) without redeployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured through:
   - **Semantic Alignment**: BIM models are enriched with runtime semantics (e.g., sensor configurations) to minimize semantic drift (e.g., Abbasi et al.’s approach).
   - **Validation**: The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to measure the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart in the Living Lab case study.
   - **Verification**: Automated model validation (e.g., via model-to-model transformations) and real-time synchronization checks (e.g., Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware).
   - **Uncertainty Management**: Post-occupancy data (e.g., BOREALIS’ sensor feedback) is used to iteratively refine control policies and DT models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on **Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware** for real-time data exchange, enabling bidirectional communication between physical assets and the DT. The framework automates metadata extraction (e.g., device IDs, endpoint addresses) to facilitate seamless integration. While the documents do not specify protocols like MQTT, the emphasis is on **real-time synchronization** and middleware-based connectivity for operational control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **scalable, service-oriented platform** leveraging cloud/edge infrastructure for runtime components. Unreal Engine 5 visualizations are likely hosted on dedicated servers or cloud platforms for high-performance rendering. The framework supports modular deployment, allowing services (e.g., analytics, control plugins) to be added/removed dynamically without redeployment."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration occurs via:
   - **Standardized Extension Points**: DT Engineers can integrate custom services (e.g., IoT analytics, AI-driven control) without disrupting core DT functionality.
   - **BIM-Based Interoperability**: Unified semantics (e.g., device models, control logic) enable seamless exchange with external systems (e.g., facility management platforms, IoT gateways).
   - **Middleware Middleware**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto supports interoperability with heterogeneous IoT devices and cloud services."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework follows:
   - **BIM Standards**: BIM as the semantic foundation for device modeling and control logic.
   - **MDE Standards**: Model-driven transformations (e.g., model-to-model/model-to-text) for automated DT deployment.
   - **Middleware Standards**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange and interoperability.
   - **AECO-Specific Standards**: Compliance with AECO domain requirements (e.g., life-cycle optimization, real-time monitoring) via BIM-centric control configurations and standardized extension points."
]
